---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for MNMX Core
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve. Focus on the
use case, not the implementation.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or change you would like to see. Include API sketches
or pseudocode if helpful.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered and
why they are insufficient.

## Additional Context

Any other information, references, or examples that support this request.
Relevant academic papers, competing implementations, or benchmarks are
welcome.
